refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 for each sub-cycle phase under defined duty cycle and site conditions; verify combined cycle meets CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Load handling affects travel start timing
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by cycle phase but require coordination at cycle boundaries; manageable coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate cycle phase detection and timing synchronization
Risk of suboptimal coordination causing cycle time increase
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage phase transitions.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system control and coordination of load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange real-time operational data for cycle phase monitoring and performance feedback

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive cycle task commands and parameters from higher-level control or operator

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Send safety alerts related to cycle operations impacting safety

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralized control and coordination aligns well with cycle time optimization FR and selected DPs.
Vehicle module implements physical actuation but less suited for overall cycle time coordination.
Teleoperation supports remote control but not primary cycle time optimization.
Safety Services focus on safety alerts, not cycle time control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic and coordination in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and maximizes containment.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple cycle phases
Risk of interface overload with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interfaces and modularize cycle phase controllers within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the original requirement into manageable sub-functions; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR with acceptable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
Interface management with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as ownership candidate; diffusion risks manageable with modular design.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface for cycle phase transitions
Modularize NGHE Solution internal design to reduce complexity
Clarify interface contracts with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments satisfy the requirement with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Risks and assumptions are identified with mitigation paths.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Cycle phases can be accurately detected and controlled
NGHE Solution module can handle integration complexity
open_risks: Coordination overhead causing cycle time delays
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype NGHE Solution module
